document: Only Wipro's credit count is dashboard-confirmed (1443 credits on 29 May 2026); other parse_credits are computed at 3 credits/page
LlamaParse cost-effective tier: parse_page_with_llm = 3 credits/page x $1.25/1000 credits = $0.00375/page
Groq pricing (openai/gpt-oss-120b): $1 / 6.7M input tokens & $1 / 1.7M output tokens
Markdown context cap is 320k chars (~80k tokens); larger PDFs trigger head+tail truncation
Walmart 10-K markdown was small enough that no truncation triggered (~40k input tokens instead of ~80k)
